name: Scrambled Eggs
instructions: Whisk eggs then cook on low heat stirring constantly

name: Toast with Peanut Butter
instructions: Toast bread then spread peanut butter on top

name: Pasta with Butter
instructions: Boil pasta until soft then drain and mix with butter

name: Cheese Omelette
instructions: Whisk eggs pour into pan then add cheese and fold

name: Tuna Sandwich
ingredients: 1 Can Tuna, 2 Slices Bread, 1 tbsp Mayo
instructions: Mix tuna with mayo then spread on bread

name: Instant Noodles
instructions: Boil water add noodles cook for 3 minutes then add seasoning

name: Banana with Honey
instructions: Slice bananas and drizzle honey on top

name: Grilled Chicken
ingredients: 2 Chicken Breasts, Salt, Pepper, 1 tbsp Oil
instructions: Season chicken then grill on medium heat for 12 minutes each side

name: Caesar Salad
ingredients: 2 Cups Lettuce, 1 tbsp Caesar Dressing, Croutons
instructions: Chop lettuce mix with dressing and top with croutons

name: Vegetable Stir Fry
ingredients: 1 Cup Broccoli, 1 Carrot, 1 tbsp Soy Sauce, 1 tbsp Oil
instructions: Heat oil in pan add vegetables and stir fry for 10 minutes then add soy sauce

name: Pancakes
ingredients: 1 Cup Flour, 1 Egg, 1 Cup Milk, 1 tbsp Sugar
instructions: Mix ingredients then cook on pan for 2 minutes each side

name: Rice with Fried Egg
ingredients: 1 Cup Rice, 2 Cups Water, 1 Egg, Salt
instructions: Cook rice then fry egg and place on top

name: Chocolate Mug Cake
ingredients: 4 tbsp Flour, 4 tbsp Sugar, 2 tbsp Cocoa, 1 Egg, 3 tbsp Milk, 3 tbsp Oil
instructions: Mix all ingredients in a mug then microwave for 90 seconds

name: Fruit Salad
instructions: Chop all fruit into small pieces and mix with honey

name: Grilled Cheese Tomato
ingredients: 2 Slices Bread, 1 Slice Cheese, 2 Slices Tomato, 1 tbsp Butter
instructions: Butter bread place cheese and tomato inside then grill on pan until golden
